flags.clause_title: A Party's Background IP, means the Intellectual Property that Party has a
flags.snippet: A Party's Background IP, means the Intellectual Property that Party has agreed to contribute for use in relation to a Project, which:
flags.rationale: Intellectual Property — UoA Contracting Positions does not cover IP. All IP clauses must be referred to Auckland UniServices (Head of IP) for review.

flags.clause_title: a. Is owned or otherwise controlled by that Party, whether alone or joint
flags.snippet: a. Is owned or otherwise controlled by that Party, whether alone or jointly with a third party, at the commencement of the relevant Project, including (without limitation) the Background IP of that Party detailed in the…
flags.rationale: Intellectual Property — UoA Contracting Positions does not cover IP. All IP clauses must be referred to Auckland UniServices (Head of IP) for review.

flags.clause_title: b. Is subsequently developed or acquired by that Party other than during
flags.snippet: b. Is subsequently developed or acquired by that Party other than during the course of carrying out a Project.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: Commercialise, in relation to Project IP, means to:
flags.snippet: Commercialise, in relation to Project IP, means to:
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: a. Manufacture, sell, hire or otherwise exploit a product or process, tha
flags.snippet: a. Manufacture, sell, hire or otherwise exploit a product or process, that uses or incorporates part or all of that Project IP; or
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: b. Provide a service, incorporating that Project IP; or
flags.snippet: b. Provide a service, incorporating that Project IP; or
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: c. Licence any third party to do any of those things; or
flags.snippet: c. Licence any third party to do any of those things; or
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: d. Otherwise licence or assign the Project IP,
flags.snippet: d. Otherwise licence or assign the Project IP, Regardless of whether any revenue is generated or intended to be generated, and Commercialisation shall have a corresponding meaning.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: Confidential Information, in respect of a Party, includes any and all inf
flags.snippet: Confidential Information, in respect of a Party, includes any and all information concerning the activities, business, finances, property (including Background IP) software, know-how, data (technical or non-technical), …
flags.rationale: Intellectual Property — UoA Contracting Positions does not cover IP. All IP clauses must be referred to Auckland UniServices (Head of IP) for review.

flags.clause_title: Except for any such information that:
flags.snippet: Except for any such information that: Page 2 of 14 ```
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: a. Is within the public domain or subsequently enters the public domain w
flags.snippet: a. Is within the public domain or subsequently enters the public domain without the fault of the receiving Party;
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: b. At the date of disclosure to the receiving Party is lawfully known to
flags.snippet: b. At the date of disclosure to the receiving Party is lawfully known to the receiving Party, unless both the receiving Party and the disclosing Party agree that it should remain confidential;
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Confidentiality; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Definition of confidential information excludes information already public, independently developed, previously known by receiving party, and information legally required to be disclosed. UoA must be able to disclose to agents and Affiliates. Duration up to 5 years post-completion of confidentiality period. | Acceptable: Confidentiality obligations limited in time (e.g. 5–7 years post-termination/expiry/disclosure). | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: c. Is mutually agreed by the disclosing Party and the receiving Party not
flags.snippet: c. Is mutually agreed by the disclosing Party and the receiving Party not to be confidential; or
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Confidentiality; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Definition of confidential information excludes information already public, independently developed, previously known by receiving party, and information legally required to be disclosed. UoA must be able to disclose to agents and Affiliates. Duration up to 5 years post-completion of confidentiality period. | Acceptable: Confidentiality obligations limited in time (e.g. 5–7 years post-termination/expiry/disclosure). | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: d. Is at any time received in good faith by the receiving Party from a th
flags.snippet: d. Is at any time received in good faith by the receiving Party from a third party which is lawfully in possession of the information and had the right to disclose it;
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Dispute Resolution; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Both parties must discuss in good faith before arbitration or litigation. Escalation to senior management followed by mediation before arbitration/litigation. All proceedings in English. Process must not prevent urgent interlocutory action through courts. | Acceptable: Cannot always alter dispute clauses for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts — escalation not required where this is the case. | Escalation: Senior Manager Research Grants and Contracts / General Counsel (or Designated Legal Advisor in absence).

flags.clause_title: e. Is (but only to the extent) required to be disclosed by law.
flags.snippet: e. Is (but only to the extent) required to be disclosed by law.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: Intellectual Property means all industrial and intellectual property righ
flags.snippet: Intellectual Property means all industrial and intellectual property rights (whether registered or unregistered) constituted by statute, law or otherwise and includes (without limitation) patents, plant variety rights, …
flags.rationale: Intellectual Property — UoA Contracting Positions does not cover IP. All IP clauses must be referred to Auckland UniServices (Head of IP) for review.

flags.clause_title: Project means a project to be undertaken by the Parties under this Agreem
flags.snippet: Project means a project to be undertaken by the Parties under this Agreement, which is approved by the Parties pursuant to clause 3.2, and which is recorded in a Project Agreement between the Parties.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: Project Agreement means a project agreement substantially in the form att
flags.snippet: Project Agreement means a project agreement substantially in the form attached as Schedule 1, entered into between the Parties in respect of a Project pursuant to clause 3.2.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: Project IP, in respect of a Project, means Intellectual Property develope
flags.snippet: Project IP, in respect of a Project, means Intellectual Property developed by or on behalf of AUL and or either of them, during the course of that Project, but excludes (for the avoidance of doubt) Background IP.
flags.rationale: Intellectual Property — UoA Contracting Positions does not cover IP. All IP clauses must be referred to Auckland UniServices (Head of IP) for review.

flags.clause_title: Insolvency Event, in respect of a Party, means if that Party:
flags.snippet: Insolvency Event, in respect of a Party, means if that Party:
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: a. Becomes, threatens or resolves to become or is in jeopardy of becoming
flags.snippet: a. Becomes, threatens or resolves to become or is in jeopardy of becoming subject to any form of insolvency administration;
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: b. Goes into receivership otherwise than for the purpose of solvent recon
flags.snippet: b. Goes into receivership otherwise than for the purpose of solvent reconstruction or amalgamation;
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: c. Makes or enters into or endeavours to make or enter into any compositi
flags.snippet: c. Makes or enters into or endeavours to make or enter into any composition, assignment or other arrangement with or for the benefit of that Party’s creditors;
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: d. Ceases or threatens to cease conducting its business in the normal man
flags.snippet: d. Ceases or threatens to cease conducting its business in the normal manner.
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: 2. RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE PARTIES

flags.clause_title: 2.1 Nothing in this Agreement shall be read or construed as creating a pa
flags.snippet: 2.1 Nothing in this Agreement shall be read or construed as creating a partnership of any kind, joint venture or trust (each Party being individually responsible only for its obligations as set out in this Agreement and…
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Warranties; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: University only warrants (a) it has authority to enter into the contract and (b) performance will be to a professional standard / usual good practice. Contract MUST expressly exclude all other warranties (acknowledged this may not be possible for NZ and International Funding Agency contracts). | Acceptable: No other warranties offered. | Escalation: Senior Manager, Research Grants and Contracts.

flags.clause_title: 3. ESTABLISHMENT OF PROJECTS
flags.snippet: 3. ESTABLISHMENT OF PROJECTS
flags.rationale: Topic not addressed in the UoA Preferred Contracting Positions.

flags.clause_title: 3.1 Each Party may at any time (but shall not be obliged to) submit a pro
flags.snippet: 3.1 Each Party may at any time (but shall not be obliged to) submit a proposal to the other Party in respect of a project it considers would be beneficially undertaken in collaboration with the other Party. 3.2 As soon …
flags.rationale: Touches the UoA-sensitive topic of Liability Limitations and Exclusions; exact alignment is not obvious from the clause text. Contract Manager should confirm against: Preferred: Total liability (including under indemnities offered) limited to the lesser of: (a) amount paid under the contract / contract value (subject to liability limit in Research Contract Delegations) OR (b) NZD$500,000. Limited to direct losses caused by negligent acts/omissions or wilful misconduct of the University. Consequential or indirect losses, 'hold harmless', and loss of data/profit/revenue/savings/business/goodwill explicitly excluded. | Acceptable: Total liability limit (including indemnities) in line with Research Contract Delegations. Uncapped liability acceptable ONLY for Trusted Funders on contestable rounds. Indirect losses acceptable only if total exposure is capped per Delegations. Carve-outs from cap acceptable for: Fraud, Wilful default, Personal injury/death, statutory non-excludable liability, and confidentiality (only if client revenue < NZD$150M). | Escalation: Refer Research Grants and Contracts Delegations (and Portfolio Manager for Trusted Funders on non-contestable rounds).
